overview: youCallIT is a premium restaurant web experience featuring a stunning 3D animated menu, seamless food ordering, table reservations with interactive floor plans, and live chef chat for real-time customizations — all in one beautifully crafted platform.
features: Food ordering with cart and checkout
Table reservations with interactive floor plan
Live chef chat for order modifications
Admin dashboard for orders, reservations, and menu management
Customer login and order history via Internet Identity
